purpose: EN/DE copy keys for the returning-user invite-link awaiting UI: Invited-state banner, Awaiting-state banner, awaiting badge label, and Cancel control label. Consumed by S3 (Groups page / InviteAwaitingBanner) and S4 (OutboundJoinRequestCard) via the GroupsInviteAwaitingCopy seam. No component wiring in this story.

public_api.name: groups.inviteAwaitingBanner
public_api.description: Invited-state banner text naming the group and framing the pending 'Request to join' action.

public_api.name: groups.awaitingApprovalBanner
public_api.description: Awaiting-state banner text stating the request to join the named group awaits admin approval; no action framing.

public_api.name: groups.awaitingBadgeLabel
public_api.description: Static 'awaiting' badge label rendered on the dimmed OutboundJoinRequestCard (S4).

public_api.name: groups.cancelOutboundRequestLabel
public_api.description: Static Cancel-action label for the awaiting card's Cancel control (S4).

owned_data: and the existing groups.joinRequestButton key, reused (not owned/duplicated) by this story
notes: Flat key names under groups.* (not nested under a sub-object like groups.pendingInvitations) chosen to match the exact field names already committed in stories.json's seams[].contract.fields for GroupsInviteAwaitingCopy, so S3/S4 consume the literal contract rather than a re-derived shape.
